mapper.select: SELECT sf.error_bits FROM sensor_frame sf WHERE sf.panel_id = #{panelId} ORDER BY sf.frame_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.circuit_id, c.channel_no, latest_sfc.device_arc_flag, latest_ai.verdict AS latest_ai_verdict FROM circuit c LEFT JOIN sensor_frame_circuit latest_sfc ON latest_sfc.reading_id = ( SELECT MAX(sfc.reading_id) FROM sensor_frame_circuit sfc WHERE sfc.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ) LEFT JOIN ai_diagnosis_result latest_ai ON latest_ai.result_id = ( SELECT MAX(ai.result_id) FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai WHERE ai.circuit_id = c.circuit_id ) WHERE c.panel_id = #{panelId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.channel_no ASC

SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM panel p WHERE p.panel_id = #{panelId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame start_sf WHERE start_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND start_sf.received_at <= #{thresholdAt} AND start_sf.leak_ma >= p.leak_ma_threshold AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame recover_sf WHERE recover_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND recover_sf.received_at > start_sf.received_at AND recover_sf.leak_ma < p.leak_ma_threshold ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame start_sf WHERE start_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND start_sf.received_at <= #{thresholdAt} AND start_sf.temperature >= p.temp_threshold AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame recover_sf WHERE recover_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND recover_sf.received_at > start_sf.received_at AND recover_sf.temperature < p.temp_threshold ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame start_sf WHERE start_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND start_sf.received_at <= #{thresholdAt} AND start_sf.humidity >= p.humidity_threshold AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame recover_sf WHERE recover_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND recover_sf.received_at > start_sf.received_at AND recover_sf.humidity < p.humidity_threshold ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame start_sf WHERE start_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND start_sf.received_at <= #{thresholdAt} AND start_sf.total_current >= p.overcurrent_threshold AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame recover_sf WHERE recover_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND recover_sf.received_at > start_sf.received_at AND recover_sf.total_current < p.overcurrent_threshold ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame start_sf WHERE start_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND start_sf.received_at <= #{thresholdAt} AND start_sf.gas_raw >= p.gas_threshold AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame recover_sf WHERE recover_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND recover_sf.received_at > start_sf.received_at AND recover_sf.gas_raw < p.gas_threshold ) ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame start_sf WHERE start_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND start_sf.received_at <= #{thresholdAt} AND start_sf.fire_raw >= p.fire_threshold AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sensor_frame recover_sf WHERE recover_sf.panel_id = p.panel_id AND recover_sf.received_at > start_sf.received_at AND recover_sf.fire_raw < p.fire_threshold ) ) ) )
mapper.update: UPDATE panel SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE panel_id = #{panelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
